name: migration: rule with provenance source=google-tsguide is written to tree/google/tsguide.yaml
command:
mkdir -p rubric tree && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: no any
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
    provenance: [{source: google-tsguide, class: published-standard, section_id: 5.2, url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]
' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" && grep -E '^- id: g-ts-001' tree/google/tsguide.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
